sourcePrompt: An M48 Patton main battle tank, about seven meters of hull with the gun reaching past nine, planted on wide tracks. A rounded cast hull rises to a domed turret set just forward of center, carrying a long 90mm gun ending in a T-shaped muzzle brake, with a boxy searchlight above the gun and a small machine-gun cupola on the turret. Low-poly, +X forward, ground at Y=0; named pivots for moving parts.
